response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal demonstrated C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments 10 years ago, with no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial automation systems — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and cloud technologies
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community projects
concerns: Lacks recent or substantial C++ development experience required for the role
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
Experience is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, not C++ systems programming
